daily_pulse: Today: {income} in, {expenses} out. Cash balance: {balance}. {action_count} items need attention.
weekly_review: This week: {revenue} revenue, {expenses} expenses. Top spend: {top_category} ({top_amount}). Effective tax rate: {tax_rate}.
receipt_reminder: You have {count} bank transactions this week without receipts. Want to snap them now?
recurring_anomaly: Your {vendor} subscription charged {actual} instead of the usual {expected}. Price increase?
cash_flow_warning: Heads up: your cash balance drops to {low_balance} on {date}. You have {bills} in bills but only {income} expected. {suggestion}
year_end_planning: It's November. Here's your year-end tax optimization report: {count} actions could save {savings}.
milestone_revenue: You've hit {amount} revenue this year! At this pace, annual projection: {projection}.
